untranslatable_reason: This is a philosophy statement about establishing profit targets before entry, not a position sizing rule. It describes the benefit of having a profit objective (edge in trading success) but contains no specific sizing mechanism, risk percentage, position scaling method, or quantitative threshold. The parameters provided (profit_target_multiplier, holding_period) describe target magnitude expectations, not how to size positions. This belongs in entry/pre-trade planning, not position sizing execution.
